<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="OXP5dCMtow-XrIXU1p2c"> <mxGraphModel dx="1664" dy="989" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="JBF6L7Zd33Jb3UftI8g--66" connectable="0" parent="1" style="group" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="960" width="1030" x="310" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <object placeholders="1" c4Name="HookSentry API" c4Type="Software System" c4Description="Central webhook ingestion and management API. Validates, authenticates, and dispatches incoming webhook events to the processing queue." label="<font style="font-size: 16px"><b>%c4Name%</b></font><div>[%c4Type%]</div><br><div><font style="font-size: 11px"><font color="#cccccc">%c4Description%</font></div>" id="uu5mNX67ktPJ9V-E8vmy-1"> <mxCell parent="JBF6L7Zd33Jb3UftI8g--66" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=#1061B0;fontColor=#ffffff;align=center;arcSize=10;strokeColor=#0D5091;metaEdit=1;resizable=0;points=[[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0],[0.75,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.25,0]];" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="395" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </object> <object placeholders="1" c4Name="Processing Queue" c4Type="Container" c4Technology="RabbitMQ Broker" c4Description="Decouples webhook ingestion from delivery. Buffers events between the API and workers for reliable asynchronous processing." label="<font style="font-size: 16px"><b>%c4Name%</b></font><div>[%c4Type%:&nbsp;%c4Technology%]</div><br><div><font style="font-size: 11px"><font color="#E6E6E6">%c4Description%</font></div>" id="uu5mNX67ktPJ9V-E8vmy-2"> <mxCell parent="JBF6L7Zd33Jb3UftI8g--66" style="shape=cylinder3;size=15;direction=south;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;rounded=0;labelBackgroundColor=none;fillColor=#23A2D9;fontSize=12;fontColor=#ffffff;align=center;strokeColor=#0E7DAD;metaEdit=1;points=[[0.5,0,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0],[0.5,1,0],[0,0.75,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.25,0]];resizable=0;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="240" x="395" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </object> <object placeholders="1" c4Name="Webhook Worker" c4Type="Component" c4Technology=".NET Background Service" c4Description="Consumes events from the queue and delivers them to target APIs with exponential backoff and jitter. On retry exhaustion, persists the event as a critical failure in the database." label="<font style="font-size: 16px"><b>%c4Name%</b></font><div>[%c4Type%: %c4Technology%]</div><br><div><font div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 290px; margin-left: 396px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #121212; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Central webhook ingestion and management API. Validates, authenticates, and dispatches incoming webhook events to the processing queue.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 203px; height: 1px; padding-top: 480px; margin-left: 401px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #121212; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Decouples webhook ingestion from delivery. Buffers events between the API and workers for reliable asynchronous processing.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 660px; margin-left: 396px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #121212; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.font: Consumes events from the queue and delivers them to target APIs with exponential backoff and jitter. On retry exhaustion, persists the event as a critical failure in the database.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 900px; margin-left: 536px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #121212; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Target external system that receives webhook deliveries forwarded by the Webhook Worker.

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #121212; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

font.font: Primary relational store for tenant metadata, webhook configurations, delivery logs, and critical failure records.

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
